canonical_conclusion: Under strict target isolation, the tested source-side DG control objectives do not transfer to reproducible target worst-domain improvements. However, the failure is not a simple absence of target-good states: OACI trajectories contain target-accuracy-good checkpoints that are invisible to simple source-audit selectors. Source-only competence information is weakly present in multivariate, deletion-robust observables and can be recovered by a pre-registered low-freedom diagnostic probe in-regime. Yet this signal does not establish stable cross-regime external validation: held-out support-stress regimes reveal that within-target ranking information does not transport as a pooled cross-target competence estimand. The contribution is therefore a falsification and observability framework, not a deployable target-free selector.

claims.key: C8 K1/K2 stop; C14 verdict falsified; C12 SRC anti-transfer
claims.text: The tested source-only DG control objectives (OACI-control, SRC-control) do NOT transfer to reproducible target worst-domain improvements under strict target isolation.

claims.key: 6/6 seed-levels reproducible bAcc gain via non-deployable target oracle; source-audit oracle fails
claims.text: Target-accuracy-good OACI checkpoints EXIST but are invisible to simple source-audit selectors (source-side OBSERVABILITY failure), with a separate calibration barrier.

claims.key: mean ΔNLL -0.074, ΔbAcc -0.002; SRC memorization index +1.965 (6/6 flagged)
claims.text: Selected OACI is calibration-improved / accuracy-flat (class-boundary rotation); SRC anti-transfer is source memorization.

claims.key: LOTO probe AUC 0.6023 beats perm p=0.008; best scalar |ρ|<=0.236; boundary corr +0.547
claims.text: No strong scalar source signal identifies target-good checkpoints; a WEAK multivariate source-only signal exists; class-boundary rotation is source-mirrored; source signals are calibration-biased.

claims.key: S2 0.603 / S3 0.562 beat perm; S4/S6/S7 bAcc->NaN; leakage estimability 1.0
claims.text: The weak multivariate signal SURVIVES cell-present support stress and collapses only under cell DELETION, and there because the worst-domain accuracy ENDPOINT becomes non-estimable (estimator-level), not because the signal vanished; leakage and class-boundary mirror are support-robust.

claims.key: robust-core LOTO 0.561 beats perm p=0.005 margin>=0.03 on S0/S2/S3; per-target 0.57-0.73
claims.text: A PRE-REGISTERED low-freedom robust-core probe (deletion-robust source observables) recovers weak IN-REGIME competence information (config hash frozen before the run).

claims.key: cross-regime pooled AUC 0.50-0.54; Holm 2/4->0/4; Simpson-decoupled; S7 control > S6 treatment
claims.text: Frozen cross-regime external/new-regime validation is NOT established: the C19 signal is largely REGIME-LOCAL. Apparent held-out passes do not survive robust interpretation.

claims.key: no_selector_artifact gate = True in C19 and C20
claims.text: The C19/C20 competence probe is DIAGNOSTIC-ONLY: it emits no selector and makes no deployment claim.
Target-oracle labels and source-signal identifiability analyses are diagnostic-only, joined post hoc.

claims.key: no-selector gate; C20 external validation not established
claims.text: No deployable target-free selector / competence detector is established (diagnostic-only; no-selector gate).
External / new-regime dataset generalization of the probe is NOT established.

claims.key: controlled masks only; BNCI001 not shown naturally support-mismatched
claims.text: Support mismatch as a NATURAL cause in BNCI2014_001 is NOT demonstrated (masks are controlled).
We do NOT make blanket over-claims (all-DG-failure, EEG-transfer-impossibility, or support-aware-invariance worthlessness); the falsification is protocol-scoped (single dataset / single backbone).

claims.key: within-target mean AUC ~0.63-0.65 stable; pooled does not transport
claims.text: Score CALIBRATION / a target-free competence ESTIMAND that transports cross-regime: within-target ranking appears stable (~0.64) and suggests a future score-calibration question.

claims.key: protocol only; no execution; BNCI2014_004 BARRED_pending_explicit_approval
claims.text: External-dataset validation on a genuinely new cohort, via a pre-registered protocol (C20-B) -> C21+ execution ONLY after approval. BNCI2014_004 remains BARRED.

claims.key: PD/SCZ cohorts not provisioned; clinical loader offline-only
claims.text: Real support-mismatched clinical EEG validation (hierarchical D=(cohort,subject)) is future work.

estimand_reconciliation.forbidden_reading: C20 did NOT succeed under a better estimand. within-target ~0.64 is a mechanism / future-work observation, NOT a retroactive replacement of the pre-registered pooled estimand.
estimand_reconciliation.resolution: The probe contains within-target RANKING information, but its score is not calibrated as a stable pooled cross-target / cross-regime competence estimand. Competence information exists; the estimand does not transport.
estimand_reconciliation.why_c19_stands: C19's pooled 0.561 is CONSERVATIVE relative to its per-target ~0.64 (pooling misaligns cross-target offsets and lowers the AUC), so C19's in-regime positive is if anything under-stated by pooling -- it stands.

evidence_chain.finding: OACI-control / SRC-control closed by falsification battery
target-accuracy-good checkpoints exist but source-unobservable; calibration barrier; SRC memorization
no strong scalar source signal; weak multivariate signal; boundary source-mirrored; calibration-biased
weak signal survives cell-present stress; deletion collapse = accuracy-endpoint non-estimability
pre-registered robust-core probe recovers weak IN-REGIME competence
frozen cross-regime validation NOT established; signal largely regime-local

paper_sections: strict-DG EEG; the measurement->control gap; contribution = falsification + observability + estimand boundary
target isolation; support graph; overlap-aware leakage; K1/K2; estimands
C14: OACI/SRC control objectives falsified under protocol (C8/C12/C14)
C16: target-good checkpoints exist but source-unobservable; calibration barrier; SRC memorization
C17 weak multivariate identifiability; C18 support-stress + endpoint-estimability; C19 pre-registered in-regime weak positive

paper_title: When Source-Side Signals Do Not Transfer: Falsification, Observability, and Estimand Boundaries in EEG Domain Generalization

reviewer_objections.objection: Isn't this just a negative result?
reviewer_objections.response: No -- it localizes the failure (observability + estimand boundary) and recovers a real in-regime weak positive (C19). The contribution is a falsification + observability framework.

reviewer_objections.objection: C19's positive could be noise / a fishing result.
reviewer_objections.response: Config frozen + committed BEFORE the run (hash 664007686afb520f); beat 200/200 permutations; holds vs strict chance; endpoint-augmented adds nothing.

reviewer_objections.objection: The C20 S6/S7 'passes' show partial generalization.
reviewer_objections.response: No -- Holm 2/4->0/4, permutation p-floor non-discriminative, 95% CI includes chance, S7 is the random control exceeding the S6 treatment, and the split is severity-local + Simpson-confounded.

reviewer_objections.objection: The within-target 0.64 means the probe works.
reviewer_objections.response: It is within-target RANKING, NOT the pre-registered pooled estimand; regime-nonspecific; reported as future-work calibration question, not a success.
The availability-metric bug was caught GATE-FIRST before any claim and fixed (fail-loud); reason-code-feature-loss discipline. Same for C18 v1 leakage bug.
External validation needs a pre-registered protocol + approval (C20-B), not an ad-hoc second dataset; BNCI2014_004 stays barred.
